title: Charros Beans
description: A traditional Mexican dish made with charros beans, onions, garlic, and spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add charros beans, oregano, cumin, and salt. Stir to combine.
Add water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until beans are tender.
Stir in frijoles and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
